projects.title: Developing an extended local upscaling module in MRST
details: Remodeled a local upscaling module with periodic boundary conditions into an extended local one
Implemented and compared with local and fine scale pressure field

projects.title: Automatic interpretation of well tests
details: Implemented LSTM to predict reservoir properties from pressure derivative and dp
Developed a script to match analytical model to data

projects.title: Conjugate heat transfer between rock and fracture fluid using OpenFOAM v9
details: Extracted and partitioned a micro-scale 3D image of a fractured granite rock
Simulated injection of CO2 with a lower temperature into a fractured granite with high temperature

projects.title: Identify formation lithology from well logs using ML
details: Implemented FNN by pytorch and Decision Tree by tensorflow
Implemented clustering algorithms such as SVM and k-means
